flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Marymount University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (49.7% → 41.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Marymount University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (62.1% → 53.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Marymount University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.0k → $40.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marymount University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.0k → $40.9k).
